element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player selects from 28 NFL teams with full rosters
Expanded playbooks from predecessor; ability to change plays during games (SNES/Genesis versions)
Offenses pick formation before selecting plays (PlayStation iteration)
Player controls ball carrier and executes selected play
First licensed game to use real NFL teams AND players with statistical accuracy
Player selects defensive coverage and formation
Multi-game progression with NFL records tracking; up to 3 consecutive seasons (16-bit versions)
Random weather: sunny, rain, snow; affects gameplay dynamics
Player-controlled defensive attempt; added in 16-bit iterations
Additional run play option; introduced in enhanced versions

typical_tension_triggers: Opponent possession driving toward end zone
Real-time play execution with player control
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Turn-based play selection with real-time execution creates rhythmic tension-release cycles; accelerated quarter lengths available (15 min / 10 min) for faster pacing

difficulty_curve.early_game: Entry-level team selection; basic play calling introduced through tutorial/first exhibition match
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Season mode escalates with statistical progression; opponent AI adapts to player strategy
difficulty_curve.late_game: Championship/playoff scenarios with pressure mechanics; statistical tracking rewards learned play patterns
notable_spikes: Season mode difficulty progression vs. increasingly competitive AI teams
4th quarter situations with score differentials creating clutch moments

notable_level_patterns.description: Single game mode against any NFL team; low-stakes practice for learning mechanics
Multi-game progression through NFL schedule with cumulative statistics and record tracking
notable_level_patterns.example_level: 16-game season (1991 rosters) across multiple seasons in SNES/Genesis versions

notable_level_patterns.description: All-star game mode with selected elite players; accelerated quarter options
Two-player competitive matches with identical team selection and play mechanics

sources_used: tcrf - Tecmo Super Bowl (NES) - The Cutting Room Floor
